name: Heath Bar Brunch Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter and gradually add the light brown sugar and sugar until smooth.
3. Blend in flour and 1/4 teaspoon salt; mix well.
4. Reserve 1 cup of this mixture for topping.
5. Combine buttermilk, baking soda, 1/8 teaspoon salt, egg, and vanilla. Stir into remaining butter-sugar mixture.
6. Fold in 2 finely chopped Heath bars.
7. Turn batter into a buttered 13 x 9 pan and sprinkle with the reserved topping, then with the pecans.
8. Sprinkle additional 6 crushed Heath bars on top.
9. Bake for 35 - 40 minutes.
10. Serve with cocoa-flavored whipped cream or coffee ice cream.
